summary: Kang Hyunwoo, known as Alley Boss, encounters the wealthy Pioneer guild while searching for an Orc in the Frozen Canyon. After briefly forming a party with them, Hyunwoo decides to leave to hunt solo and focus on his personal goal of getting revenge on Jung Hanbaek. While exploring, he discovers the bear Cancun fighting a boss monster and assists him in the battle, leading to a new mission to help Cancun break a curse placed by a Black Magician.
key_moments: Hyunwoo meets the Pioneer guild and adds them to his friends list.
Hyunwoo leaves the party to hunt solo for higher efficiency.
Hyunwoo saves Cancun from a boss monster and agrees to help break his curse.
